subcodes.first_line: O ye merciful friends of Abdul Baha! Although it is night, yet it is the morn of the dawn of the divine Kingdom.... The ancient bestowal of the beauty of Abha is the companion of every pure heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی عبدالبهاء هر چند شبانگاهست ولی صبحگاهی ملکوت الهی است یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
